title: Weingartia alba
taxonomy: Weingartia alba is a species of flowering plant in the family Cactaceae. It is native to Bolivia and is a type of cactus. The classification of Weingartia alba includes it being in the genus Weingartia, which is a monotypic genus consisting of only a few species. Weingartia alba is further classified as belonging to the tribe Rebulieae and subfamily Rebutiainae. Within the kingdom Plantae, Weingartia alba can be broken down further into its taxonomic ranks, including family, genus, species and other subcategories.
